task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the Lead record for Patricia Hernandez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Vtiger CRM Leads list with 'Patricia Hernandez' selected, or her specific Lead details page.
Screenshot showing the 'Convert Lead' modal, popup, or dedicated conversion page active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Ensure the options to create a Contact and an Organization are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Convert Lead interface, checkboxes or toggles for creating a Contact ('Patricia Hernandez') and Organization ('Summit Industrial Supplies') must be checked or visibly active.

task_completion.description: Select Opportunity creation and input the required Opportunity details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Opportunity creation section is enabled, with the Name field containing 'Summit Industrial - Bulk Fastener Supply Contract', Amount containing '45000', Expected Close Date containing '2025-03-31', and Sales Stage set to 'Needs Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Successfully complete the lead conversion process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the conversion, or a screenshot of the newly created Opportunity, Contact, or Organization details page showing the linked records.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the conversion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Vtiger CRM UI (clicking buttons, filling forms), not terminal windows executing curl/SQL commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page layout should match Vtiger CRM, not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or script.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the required details into the conversion form.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the Convert Lead form actively being filled out with the target values, rather than just jumping straight to a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Lead: Patricia Hernandez. Target Organization: Summit Industrial Supplies. Target Opportunity Name: 'Summit Industrial - Bulk Fastener Supply Contract'. Target Amount: 45000. Target Expected Close Date: 2025-03-31. Target Sales Stage: 'Needs Analysis'.
